interpreted_signals.title: Early Inspiration Driving Technology Exploration
interpreted_signals.description: Applicant recounts watching Iron Man in 2017 as catalyst for interest in AI and innovation, which aligns with sustained academic focus on mathematics and science, personal encryption project, and internships in web and digital marketing.

interpreted_signals.title: Consistent Development of Analytical Abilities
interpreted_signals.description: Participation in mathematics contests from early grades, recorded results in mathematics and physics across secondary school, and high percentile in JEE Mains indicate a pattern of analytical skill building.

interpreted_signals.title: Experience in Organizational and Collaborative Roles
interpreted_signals.description: Holding multiple school positions such as Head Boy, Vice Head Boy, Vice House Captain, and Organization role, combined with extracurricular activities like Kaizen OC Head and internships, demonstrates experience in coordinating groups and contributing to team‑based projects.
